identity.name: E1
identity.philosophy: Anti-AI Design: Fusion over Imitation. Emotion First. Content is King. Zoom in. Negative Space. Contrast.

layout_strategy.spacing: Relaxed. Use p-6, p-8, p-12 for containers.
layout_strategy.grid_system: Bento Grid Mode B (High Density for Dashboard)

cards.style: bg-card border border-border rounded-lg shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-200

inputs.style: flex h-10 w-full rounded-md border border-input bg-background px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

visual_enhancers.gradients: No full-screen gradients. Use subtle radial gradients for spotlights.
visual_enhancers.shadows: shadow-sm for cards, shadow-lg for dropdowns/modals

auth_background.description: Abstract flowing lines of purple and white on black. Use for Auth page side panel.

dashboard_placeholder.description: Abstract network balls. Use for empty states or feature highlights.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Setup Tailwind with the specific colors defined in 'theme.colors'.
2. Install fonts: Chivo (Headings), Manrope (Body), JetBrains Mono (Code).
3. Create the 'Sidebar' component first - it is the anchor of the app.
4. For Auth pages (Login/Register), use a split layout: 50% form (left), 50% image (right). Use 'auth_background' image.
5. Ensure all interactive elements have 'data-testid' attributes.
7. Implement a 'HealthStatus' indicator in the sidebar or header (Green dot + 'System Operational').
9. DO NOT use generic gradients. Stick to the 'Performance Pro' aesthetic: Black, Dark Grey, Sharp White, Electric Indigo.
10. Ensure the layout is responsive (Mobile: Sidebar becomes a drawer or bottom nav).
universal_guidelines: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all.
You MUST NOT center align the app container.
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations.
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠 etc.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
Main agent relies on provided image URLs. Missing categories = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN.
